title: euphrasia arctica var. dolosa
intro: Euphrasia arctica var. dolosa is a variety of the Arctic orophant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Euphrasia arctica var. dolosa are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the eyes, reduce inflammation and relieve stress, making it a popular remedy for eye problems and respiratory issues. Euphrasia arctica var. dolosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
